ie.updateNote: In 2022, there were military clashes between Armenia and Azerbaijan along their shared border. Although a ceasefire has been agreed, the situation remains tense and highly changeable, with frequent skirmishes. We advise against all travel near the border of Azerbaijan, particularly to provinces of Syunik, Vayots Dzor and the eastern part of the province of Gegharkunik. We also advise against trave
